transcript: [music and chat notification sounds only, no speech]
on_screen_text:
Riya innu neha nannu reject chesesindi [Riya, Neha rejected me today]
Nenu ametho "I am loving you since long time" anni cheppanu [I told her "I am loving you since long time"]
Ame navvutoo "modhalla English neruchuko" ani cheppesindi [She laughed and said "first learn English"]
Friends andaru akkade unnaru chala insult ayiopoyindi [All my friends were there, it was very insulting]
Aditya, badhapadaku! [Aditya, don't worry!]
Intakumundu nenu kooda neelage English matladedanni. [Before, I also used to speak English like you.]
Kani MySivi app vadina tharuvatha antha maaripoyindi. [But after using MySivi app, everything changed.]
My sivi ya ?? [My Sivi??]
Avunu! Inga AI teacher Arya unnaru. [Yes! There is an AI teacher Arya.]
Daily just 15 minutes ametho matladu, oka friend laaga. [Daily just speak with her for 15 minutes, like a friend.]
Edhavaina mistake chesina amey judge cheyyaru, correct matrame chestharu. [Even if you make any mistake, she won't judge, she will only correct.]
Appo inka hope undhaa [So is there still hope?]
Khachitanga! [Definitely!]
Oka rendu vaaralu practice cheyi... nee English chala improve avthundi, Neha-vae impress ayipothundi [Practice for two weeks... your English will improve a lot, Neha herself will be impressed]
Kani idhu chala expensive ga untundhemo? [But maybe this is very expensive?]
Ledhu, verum oka rupee dhaan! [No, just one rupee!]
Wow !!
Nenu ippude download chesthunanu [I am downloading it right now]
Rendu vaarala tharuvantha neha ki perfect English lo propose chesthunu [After two weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English]
All the best! MySivi download chesi start cheyi. [All the best! Download MySivi and start.]
summary: The ad features a simulated WhatsApp conversation where a guy shares his embarrassment after being rejected by a girl due to his poor English. His friend recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher Arya and an affordable price of just 1 rupee. The protagonist is motivated to download the app immediately to improve his English and propose again.
